media.alt_text: Limited Edition Vastu Trishakti Yantra Trishul For Prosperity

variants.title: Limited Edition Vastu Trishakti Yantra Trishul For Prosperity

description.plain: Bring divine protection, balance, and abundance into your life with the Limited Edition Vastu Trishakti Yantra Trishul. Crafted according to the ancient principles of Vastu Shastra, this sacred symbol combines the Trishul (trident), Om, and Swastik—three of the most powerful energies in Vedic tradition. Together, they form the Trishakti Yantra, a spiritual shield that dispels negativity, attracts prosperity, and harmonizes the flow of energy in your home or workplace. Why You Need the Vastu Trishakti Yantra Trishul Protection from Negative Energies: The Trishul wards off harmful vibrations, bringing peace and stability to your surroundings. Prosperity & Success: The Swastik is an ancient symbol of good fortune, wealth, and continuous growth. Spiritual Balance & Harmony: The Om invokes divine blessings, raising the vibration of your environment and connecting you to higher consciousness. Benefits of Placing This Yantra in Your Space Shields your home and office from financial obstacles and misfortune. Attracts abundance, wealth, and success in business and personal life. Enhances spiritual energy, helping you stay grounded, focused, and protected. Brings harmony to relationships by neutralizing negative forces. How to Use Place the Vastu Trishakti Yantra Trishul at the entrance of your home, office, or sacred space. Positioning it here not only protects your environment but also ensures that positive energy flows freely, welcoming prosperity and blessings into your life. ✨ This is a limited-edition piece, making it not just a powerful spiritual remedy but also a rare collectible for seekers of wealth, success, and divine grace.

media.alt_text: Limited Edition Vastu Trishakti Yantra Trishul For Prosperity

products.title: Mantra Of Success For Life In Hindi (सफलता के मंत्र मन की शक्ति से जीवन, व्यवसाय और परिवार में विकल्प)

media.alt_text: Mantra of success for life in Hindi (सफलता के मंत्र मन की शक्ति से जीवन, व्यवसाय और परिवार में विकल्प) - Distacart

variants.title: Mantra Of Success For Life In Hindi (सफलता के मंत्र मन की शक्ति से जीवन, व्यवसाय और परिवार में विकल्प)

description.plain: Mantra of success for life in Hindi (सफलता के मंत्र मन की शक्ति से जीवन, व्यवसाय और परिवार में विकल्प) About The Product: सफलता के मंत्र मन की शक्ति से जीवन, व्यवसाय और परिवार में विकल्प यह पुस्तक जीवन के हर पहलू में सफलता प्राप्त करने के लिए मानसिक शक्ति का उपयोग करने पर आधारित है। लेखक ने यह बताया है कि कैसे मानसिकता को सही दिशा में मोड़कर हम न केवल अपने व्यक्तिगत जीवन, बल्कि अपने व्यवसाय और परिवार में भी संतुलन और सफलता प्राप्त कर सकते हैं। यह पुस्तक आपको यह सिखाती है कि मानसिक शक्ति का सही उपयोग कैसे किया जाए, जिससे आप अपनी चुनौतियों को पार कर सकें और अपने लक्ष्यों को प्राप्त कर सकें। साथ ही, यह पुस्तक यह भी बताती है कि जीवन में सकारात्मक दृष्टिकोण और मानसिक संतुलन बनाए रखना क्यों महत्वपूर्ण है, और कैसे यह आपके जीवन को एक नई दिशा और ऊर्जा दे सकता है। पुस्तक में दिए गए मंत्रों और रणनीतियों के माध्यम से आप अपने कार्यों में अधिक सफलता और अपने परिवार और व्यक्तिगत जीवन में अधिक खुशहाली प्राप्त कर सकते हैं। यह पुस्तक न केवल मानसिक शक्ति को समझने के लिए एक मार्गदर्शिका है, बल्कि यह आपको अपने जीवन को संपूर्ण रूप से समृद्ध बनाने के लिए प्रेरित भी करती है।Mantra of Success for Life is based on using mental power to achieve success in every aspect of life. The author explains how by channeling the right mindset, we can achieve not only personal success but also maintain balance in our business and family life. This book teaches how to harness mental power to overcome challenges and achieve goals. It also emphasizes the importance of maintaining a positive outlook and mental equilibrium, showing how it can give a new direction and energy to your life. Through the mantras and strategies provided in the book, you can achieve greater success in your work and more happiness in your family and personal life. This book is not just a guide to understanding mental power, but also a source of inspiration to enrich your life in its entirety. Language: Hindi No. of Pages: 111 Legal Disclaimer : Product color may slightly vary due to photographic lighting sources or your monitor settings.

media.alt_text: Special Yantra - Wealth & Success

description.plain: Special Yantra is also called Shree Yantra. Special Yantra is one of the most auspicious, important, and powerful yantras, which not only gives benefits but also proves to be beneficial for almost everyone. The special Yantra is the most dynamic Yantra. It is also known as the king of all Yantras and is considered to be the abode of all gods and goddesses. It is a very efficient Yantra for concentration, contemplation, and meditation. The special yantra is believed to be the abode of Goddess "Tripura Sundari" and this yantra is described in "Saundarya-Lahiri" composed by Adiguru Shankaracharya. This yantra gives wealth. This yantra is also known as Sree Chakra. It is the source of achieving all worldly desires and fulfilling all desires through inner strength and mental strength. Shree means money and yantra means, hence it is considered a means of wealth. Benefits of Special Yantra Special Yantra is also called Shree Yantra. The special yantra has been considered the source of wealth. Special Yantra is the most auspicious, important, and powerful Yantra. The blessings of all the deities reside on this yantra. It is helpful for concentration, contemplation, and meditation. It helps in the fulfillment of all worldly desires. This yantra fulfills all desires through inner strength and mental power. It gives peace, happiness, popularity, power, authority, wealth, prosperity, and success. Worshipping this yantra brings wealth, fame, respect, power, prosperity, vehicles, and all luxuries. The special yantra is believed to be the abode of Goddess "Tripura Sundari". Why Should Buy Special Yantra From House of Bejan Daruwalla The worshipper of the particular Yantra is blessed with peace, happiness, popularity, power, authority, wealth, prosperity, and success. Officers should use this yantra to gain fame, power, and financial benefits. Keeping this yantra is undoubtedly the easiest and best way to end one's financial problems forever. You can get wealth, fame, prestige, power, prosperity, vehicles, and all luxuries by keeping a Shree Yantra in the house and worshipping it. This yantra can also be kept in the workplace. Worshipping Shree yantra for nine days of Navratri gives more benefits and prosperity. If you want to improve your financial condition then you can also talk to astrologers online. Our team believes in delivering Good quality and energetic Yantras. We understand the problems of our customers, and then recommend this yantra to them, with proper guidance as to how to keep it and pray with mantras. It is made specially according to your horoscope with mantras and puja on it. Special Yantras help in solving most of the problems of our life. Also, the proper Special Yantras for a particular problem will give you many benefits. You will be given proper advice to choose the appropriate specialized equipment according to the problem you are facing. From here you will get the best high-quality yantras. It will be sent highly energetically according to your horoscope and the problems you are facing in your life so that you can get its benefits. Delivery Instructions Our team delivers Special Yantra across the world. It usually takes five to seven days for delivery in India. You can mail us at info@bejandaruwalla.com for any kind of inquiry and knowledge of yantras. For the further type of inquiry and knowledge, call us at 09825470377 (For Shipping in India) or +919825470377 (For Outside India).

media.alt_text: Buddhist Blessing Green Agate Three-eyed Dzi Bead Power Success Bracelet

variants.title: Buddhist Blessing Green Agate Three-eyed Dzi Bead Power Success Bracelet

description.plain: Green Agate Dzi Bead Bracelet features Green Agate paired with a Three-eyed Dzi Bead, symbolizing power, success, and protection. Green Agate is known for promoting balance and inner harmony, while the Three-eyed Dzi Bead is revered for attracting wealth and opportunities. This bracelet combines these energies, making it a meaningful accessory for those focused on achieving personal goals and finding strength and prosperity in daily life.💕 Product Description Green Agate ♥ Power ♥ Success ♥ Manifestation ♥ Support ♥ Green Agate has the meaning and properties of giving courage to the owner. It has been loved as "a gemstone of power" from the old days. It also has been told that it was embedded in the armor for the soldiers. Green Agate would give you the energy to win a battle. These days, it is worn as a gemstone that leads business to victory. It is useful when you want to have a good result at work or when you want the power to go forward. Three-eyed Dzi Bead ♥ Luck ♥ Protection ♥ Happiness ♥ Dzi bead (pronounced "zee"; alternative spelling: gzi) is a type of stone bead of uncertain origin worn as part of a necklace and sometimes as a bracelet. Dzi beads are precious jewelry from Tibetan culture which is generally prized as protective amulets,these beads are believed to attract local protectors, dharmapalas or deities or maybe beneficial ghosts, ancestors or even bodhisattvas, Because of this, dzi beads are always treated with respect inTibetan culture.Three-Eye Dzi Bead favors three different aspirations in life. These are aspirations in career growth, attaining wealth.Wearing this bead allows you to succeed at work and in your personal life, strengthens health and harmonizes the condition of a person. Specifications: Item Type: Bracelet Band type: premium elastic string Wrist Circumference: 16cm Bead Size: 8mm Material: Green Agate, Three-eyed Dzi Bead Note: 1. Products are made of natural materials, please take off the product when you are ready to sleep or wash. 2. The above data is manual measurement, there is a slight deviation, please understand! 3. The materials used in all our products are naturally environmentally friendly. 4. These products are HANDMADE and NATURAL, therefore they may present some irregularities and due to lighting effects, the color may slightly vary from the one shown in the picture.

description.plain: Green Agate Dzi Bead Bracelet features Green Agate paired with a Three-eyed Dzi Bead, symbolizing power, success, and protection. Green Agate is known for promoting balance and inner harmony, while the Three-eyed Dzi Bead is revered for attracting wealth and opportunities. This bracelet combines these energies, making it a meaningful accessory for those focused on achieving personal goals and finding strength and prosperity in daily life.💕 Product Description Green Agate ♥ Power ♥ Success ♥ Manifestation ♥ Support ♥ Green Agate has the meaning and properties of giving courage to the owner. It has been loved as "a gemstone of power" from the old days. It also has been told that it was embedded in the armor for the soldiers. Green Agate would give you the energy to win a battle. These days, it is worn as a gemstone that leads business to victory. It is useful when you want to have a good result at work or when you want the power to go forward. Three-eyed Dzi Bead ♥ Luck ♥ Protection ♥ Happiness ♥ Dzi bead (pronounced "zee"; alternative spelling: gzi) is a type of stone bead of uncertain origin worn as part of a necklace and sometimes as a bracelet. Dzi beads are precious jewelry from Tibetan culture which is generally prized as protective amulets,these beads are believed to attract local protectors, dharmapalas or deities or maybe beneficial ghosts, ancestors or even bodhisattvas, Because of this, dzi beads are always treated with respect inTibetan culture.Three-Eye Dzi Bead favors three different aspirations in life. These are aspirations in career growth, attaining wealth.Wearing this bead allows you to succeed at work and in your personal life, strengthens health and harmonizes the condition of a person. Specifications: Item Type: Bracelet Band type: premium elastic string Wrist Circumference: 16cm Bead Size: 8mm Material: Green Agate, Three-eyed Dzi Bead Note: 1. description.plain: Trishakti & Ganesha Pendant’ as Car Rearview Mirror/Home-Decor Ornament - Religious/Spiritual & Inspirational reminder of Blessings, Faith, Positive Vibrations - Protection from ill intent, negative energies projected towards you In eastern spiritualism/mythology (particularly in India) - people would display pious symbols outside their houses to ward off evil spirits/energies and attract good luck & fortune. ‘Trishakti Yantra’ translates directly into English as Tri-Energy Device/Tool, and the symbol itself exhibits mystical powers to purify & protect its surroundings. In Indian spiritualism/mythology, Trishakti comprises the three most auspicious and powerful symbols together - ‘Swastik - OM - Trishul’. ‘Trishul’ is one of the weapons of SHIVA, and its three points represent the three trinities - creation, maintenance, destruction. Symbolizing the blessings of all the deities, it removes all negativity. ‘OM’ - is one of the most recognizable spiritual/religious symbols, and as a seed sound of the cosmos/universe/divine, it creates positive vibrations in and around its surroundings. ‘Swastik’ is a symbol associated with Ganesha/Ganesh and is known to bring good fortune and well-being from all four directions. It is a sacred symbol in Hinduism/Buddhism/Jainism. ‘Ganesha’ symbolization in the form of a pendant is a harbinger of good luck, success, prosperity and embodiment of wisdom as it keeps away/removes negative energies, obstacles that bring bad luck & misfortune. You can carry 'Trishakti Yantra' in your handbag, backpack, purse and/or affix it on the door and/or keep it in your prayer/puja/meditation room and/or use it as a dangler on your car rearview mirror. Material: Trishakti (Metal), Ganesha (Metal), Tussle along with matching Metallic Findings
